curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff. The handler (GetCustomerThreadForViewingHandler.php) constructs a direct public URL to the uploaded attachment file using _THEME_PROD_PIC_DIR_ concatenated with the filename, and the Twig template (thread_messages.html.twig) renders this as a direct link. The patch replaces both: the handler now stores only the filename, and the template routes through a new SecuredFileReaderController that validates file extensions and sets proper Content-Type/Content-Disposition headers. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern. The pre-assigned xss class is correct — CWE-79 matches the XSS via unsanitized file serving.
